race.description: Chemsave Narrandera Pharmacy L W Peacock Memorial (Bm50) Hcp
race.comment: WIRE TO WIRE (4) was quickly into stride and went on to score by a head last time out at Nowra when shedding the maiden tag. Not a great deal tougher this time and keeps the claimer on to aid the big weight. Can get the job done again. DANTAINS PRIZE (11) never fired a shot last time but chased gamely into fourth the run prior behind a smart one and the form around her stacks right up. Will find this a fair bit easier. REWARD WITH A ROSE (12) has been thereabouts in her two runs back and should be peaking now. Draws to get the gun run from the inside pillar and is one of the main chances. TOMANADO (10) continues to leave himself with too much to do but has been warming late. If they can utilise the low draw this time he's a live chance to break through. THREE MUSKETEERS (1) caught the eye two back at Seymour when closing off well into fourth under the big weight after settling near the rear. Carries another big weight. Keeping onside in the placings.
